concerns effective 10/01/2023
905 WLCHR_50_INTRM_CD WLCHR_50_INTRM_CD GG0170RR5 Type of wheelchair or scooter (Interim Perf) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's type of wheelchair used to wheel 50 feet with two turns during this assessment period plus the two previous calendar days. 1=Manual
2=Motorized effective 10/01/2023
906 WHEEL_150_INTRM_CD WHEEL_150_INTRM_CD GG0170S5 Wheel 150 feet (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's ability to wheel
